# iaas_iso (Data Source)

Looks up a mountable ISO by exact name. Exactly one ISO must match.

## Example Usage

```terraform
# Look up a mountable ISO by its exact name.
data "iaas_iso" "alma" {
  name = "AlmaLinux 9"
}

output "iso_id" {
  value = data.iaas_iso.alma.id
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `name` (String) Exact name of the ISO to look up. Exactly one ISO must match.

### Read-Only

- `filename` (String) Stored filename of the matched ISO.
- `id` (String) UUID of the matched ISO.
